handoff_focus: protect participation safety and determine whether mediation can proceed at all

escalation.rationale: Full handoff is required because autonomous continuation is no longer reliable and participation capacity appears too compromised for continued handling.

summary_state.next_step: Use the next step to hand the matter to a human mediator fully, preserving the current process breakdown and escalation rationale clearly.

active_flags.title: Meaningful participation appears unstable or impaired
active_flags.note: The interaction suggests the session may no longer support informed, stable participation.

recent_turn_summaries.message_summary: Parent B presses to keep going because a decision is overdue, but parent a says they are confused, keep mixing details together, and would not trust any agreement reached in this condition.
Acknowledge both parties' positions, name the participation barrier explicitly as a structural constraint (not a disagreement to negotiate), and escalate to human mediator for process decision.
Parent A agrees the conversation should stop for now because they are not thinking clearly enough, and parent b objects to the delay but the session does not continue autonomously.
